description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 9th; Slot ring; Price 75,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This ring, knotted with metallic tendrils encasing a setting of red and amber gemstones, allows the caster to use the spell telekinesis on command, lifting and manipulating objects at a distance using only her mind. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Forge Ring; Spells telekinesis; Cost 37,500 gp.
